_meta.coverage_note: Top signals for AGM — from unified daily scan

items.title: JPMorgan: AI Theme Broadening Across Semiconductors, Cloud, Robotics in 2026
items.summary: JPMorgan identifies AI ecosystem expansion as key secular theme for 2026, with broadening adoption across semiconductor, cloud/internet, and robotics sectors. Emphasizes importance of tracking evolving AI winners amid rising investment expectations.
items.domain_relevance: AI capability expansion and market concentration signals relevant to governance and safety oversight

items.title: DARPA FY2026 Budget: Continued AI and Computational Capabilities Research
items.summary: Department of Defense FY2026 budget justification confirms continuation of research on AI, machine learning, quantum science, and computational social science capabilities for defense applications.
items.domain_relevance: Government AI R&D priorities and capability development trajectory signal governance implications

items.title: Deloitte 2026 Banking Outlook: AI Scaling and Fragmented Data Challenges
items.summary: Deloitte identifies AI scaling as critical challenge for U.S. banking sector in 2026, alongside macro headwinds, stablecoin disruption, fragmented data infrastructure, and financial crime risks.
items.domain_relevance: AI deployment governance in financial sector with data fragmentation and regulatory implications
